title: Semijoin returns duplicate values from a column with unique values
bug_features_seed: INSERT INTO dict SELECT value FROM (SELECT 1 + n AS value FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS n FROM (SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0) t1, (SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0 UNION ALL SELECT 0) t2, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r) numbers WHERE n < 2050) AS series;
INSERT INTO t (i) SELECT value FROM dict WHERE value % 2 = 0;
SELECT d.value FROM dict d JOIN t ON d.value = t.i;
key_bug_features: Semijoin returns duplicates from unique column values
